recipe.title: Sunday: Super Green Pasta with Strawberry Goat Cheese Salad
ingredients: 1/2 cup grated Parmesan + more for serving
3 tbsp olive oil (salad), 1.5 tbsp balsamic vinegar, 1 tsp Dijon mustard
steps: Cook pasta. Reserve 1 cup pasta water.|Blanch spinach 30 sec in boiling water, drain. Blend spinach, basil, garlic, olive oil, Parmesan, pasta water until smooth. Season.|Toss hot pasta with green sauce. Add pasta water to desired consistency. Season.|Make dressing: whisk olive oil, balsamic, Dijon. Toss mixed greens with dressing.|Plate: nest of green pasta, strawberry goat cheese salad on side, extra Parmesan.
